body:
sapphic-dice:

gendiebrainrotreceipts:

sapphic-dice:

Trans healthcare is a human right.

Because healthcare is a human right.

And trans people, are people.

What you neglect to mention is that the ‘healthcare’ you’re referring to is entirely cosmetic and thereby not healthcare at all

It’s more than cosmetic.

It’s also physiological and psychological.

Treating people as they are, instead of forcing them into repression and self hatred, saves lives.

Gender is some human made bullshit, and sex is (if drastically simplified) a bimodal distribution of correlation of traits.

Im not here to argue with you.

But trans healthcare saved my life.

It’s what made living, as difficult as it can be, something possible for me. And so many others. <
